zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Langton於大約1457年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾蘭頓時，她的父親John Langston37歲，母親Elizabeth Eure40歲。她和Sir James Danby至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1514年在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Langton于大约1457年出生在英国英格兰越可爾蘭頓时，她的父亲John Langston37岁，母亲Elizabeth Eure40岁。她和Sir James Danby至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1514年在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Langton was born about 1457, in Langton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Langston, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Eure, was 40. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Sir James Danby. She died in 1514, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Langton est née environ 1457, à Langton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Langston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Eure, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Sir James Danby. Elle est décédée en 1514, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Langton um 1457 in Langton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Langston 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Eure 40. Sie hatte mit Sir James Danby mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1514 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Langton è nata il circa 1457 nel Langton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Langston, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Eure, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Sir James Danby. Morì nel 1514, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Langtonが約1457年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラントンで生まれた時，父John Langstonは37歳，母Elizabeth Eureは40歳であった。彼女はSir James Danbyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1514年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Langton(이)가 대략 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 랭턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Langston(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Eure(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Sir James Danby(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Langton nasceu aproximadamente 1457, em Langton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Langston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Eure, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir James Danby. Ela faleceu em 1514, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Langton родилась около 1457 г. в местности лангтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Langston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Eure, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sir James Danby. Она умерла в 1514 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Langton nació aproximadamente 1457, en Langton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Langston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Eure, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir James Danby. Murió en 1514, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
